notes.body: L5 Customer Compliment — New Albany (384): "Matthew & Team, way to make a positive impact OCAT — One Customer At A Time! Great Job!" Standing: June budget at bottom of 2065 sheet; Large soda only 30c more; Blackberry counter sign posted.

Forwarded the New Albany L5 compliment — "Great Job! Thanks Matthew and team New Albany!" Standing: welcome new H.R./Payroll Hannah Kaufman; review KPI miss chart; swag contest live (812-267-8669, no GMs).
KY-2065 open tasks: Labor Review (L-Rev) for 06/12 needs approval; Vendor Order Receiving (VO-Rec — Performance Foodservice CIN01984) pending receipt.
